description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy. Use the golang:1.20 Docker image for the build and test jobs, each publishing the gosmtpd binary as an artifact. In the build stage add a build job that runs CGO_ENABLED=0 go build. In the test stage add a test job that runs go test -v -race --cover. In the deploy stage add a build-docker job that runs only on the master branch, uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, defines IMAGE_TAG as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG, exports VERSION=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M), logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER/$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, builds the image with docker build -t $IMAGE_TAG ., tags it as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$VERSION, and pushes both tags to the GitLab Container Registry, depending on the build and test jobs for artifacts.
